set.body: Add a portable matrix-free LinearOperator.kronecker(left, right) for DoubleLinearOperator. Preserve forward and transpose application without materializing the Kronecker matrix; validate non-overflowing shape; cover dense differential, adjoint, shape errors, and JVM/JS tests. This is a general Gale primitive needed by ScalaFIM's typed multivariate operator architecture.
set.title: Kronecker linear operator
